item.title: My 16th favorite. Original title was "I hope he understands fully one day."
item.description:
My five-year-old: “Dad! Dad! Why are there scars on your arms?” My answer: “Because I got hurt a very long time ago, and it didn't heal right.” Growing concern. Typically when my son is only half-interested in something, he's looking at/doing something else. If I have his undivided attention, it's a clear sign that the questions aren't going to stop for a while. “How did you get hurt?”
Momentary resentment. I don't want to talk about this. But there's no way he could know what it meant; he's five. I strangle the resentment and pick him up put him in my lap, moving my tablet aside. He's not as light as he used to be. “When I was younger...not as young as you, but younger, I met a monster.” “Like a dragon?” he asks, half-excited and half-concerned. I blame Peter Jackson for his current obsession with dragons, just like I'm sure my parents did Ralph Bakshi when I was his age. “Not really like a dragon,” I said, mulling over how to proceed. “More like Gollum. Small, quiet, sneaky. Hard to see a lot of times. You weren't always sure he'd be there, but he always was, even if you couldn't see him.”
“Did he bite you a lot?” he asks. My guess is he's trying to line up the Gollum parallel. “No, no biting,” I replied. “More tricksy. He would occasionally hurt me, by making me sleepy when I shouldn't have been, or tell me lies about other people.” “Oh.” This is the typical response when I'm losing his understanding. “Sometimes, he'd be so tricksy, that I'd get confused and hurt myself, instead of him. That's why I have these scars on my arm. I would try to cut him and wind up cutting myself, instead.” Not even slightly true, but I feel some artistic license is necessary when talking about this with a five-year-old.
“Did you beat him?” Always on point for the narrative. That's my boy. “I did. I thought I had to fight him alone, but that's not true. One of those lies he told. I went to find help. I found some people who had fought the monster before, and they showed me that using a knife to fight him is wrong. They told me how they fought him, and how they got him to leave them alone forever. I also met with some doctors who studied the monster and helped the other people who fought him.”
“Did you slay him?” Momentary pride. I didn't know what 'slay' meant at his age. “I didn't. He's still out there. Somewhere, but far away. I don't think he's ever gonna mess with me again.” “He's still alive?” “Yeah. No one knows how to slay him for good. But if he ever comes back, I'll be ready.” Front page edit: I was expecting to brighten a few people's days, maybe help someone suffering with this post. I was absolutely NOT ready for the forty-foot-tall tidal wave of messages containing thank-yous, love, support, and similar stories. Please be patient, friends, I'm getting to you as I get to you.
I (TheMaskedRaven) added this last image. Sometimes for Imgur's birthday, I will skip over a favorite. Maybe I no longer understand why I decided to favorite it in the first place, or perhaps the original post was too personal. While this particular post was a rather personal story, I felt it carried an important message, and that it should be shared. To those struggling with depression and/or anxiety: You do not have to go through this alone. Feel free to send me a message if you'd like someone to talk to, and check in the comments as well, as I'm sure many others will volunteer to provide emotional support. Finally, please check out the original post and give them an upvote. I'm sure @Venturite would appreciate it. https://imgur.com/gallery/i-hope-he-understands-fully-one-day-H8tgC
item.dc:creator: TheMaskedRaven

.

.
Putting the D in degenerate.
.
It's filling.
.

.
.
.
.
.
And the fascism.

item.title: Don't forget.
item.description: American friends, Canadians will never hate YOU. But we will hate your leader. We will hate your politics. We will hate your policies. Generally, we love our way of life and we love being your neighbour, but we have NO intention to ever be the "51st state". When this is all said and done, and that Candied Yam that you have running your country finally rots, you'll still be invited to the block party. And we will work it out over beers and poutine.
item.dc:creator: ohgodthehorror

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1280 (absolutely harmless songbird)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Did you know that in the middle ages, rowboat jousting was an actual thing?
Having someone light a cigar like this for me is now on my bucket list I guess.
If I ever do the dating profile thing again, I'll be sure to put a photo of me in my Scythian gear with the caption, "Willing to be a Steppe dad."
Also, my father, my high school bullies, some former bosses....some exes... former friends.... former enemies...
I don't wanna be on this ride anymore. Would someone from Europe or Canada PLEASE marry me and get me out of this hellhole, PRETTY, please?
I mean, they want to take our postal service from us, and I'm not talking about the emo band, either. They literally don't want us writing to one another. Or sending letters. Or cookies. They don't want you to send cookies. Write your senators and representatives.
Or slaughter them for their sins against their constituents, whatever, though for legal reasons, this sentence is totally a joke. Much like the American government.
I'd almost rather live in Skyrim right now.
Let's get into some good trouble, guys.
Me asking a coworker yesterday if she'd seen the new Star Trek and saying that I would be willing to join her if she wanted to catch up may have been responsible for everyone receiving an email re-iteration of the company's sexual harassment policy today. This makes me feel like absolute slime, so I'm just not going to talk to my female coworkers umprompted anymore and will give no personal details of likes, dislikes, or interests. I am honestly very phobic about seeming creepy and giving any sort of attention that could be seen as unwelcome, and my operating conclusion is that ANY attention from me is unwelcome. I ain't as handsome as Luigi, nor have I killed as many CEOs to be seen as attractive.
Oh shit, this meme violates those rules.
(I may be misinterpreting something else going on, but I haven't seen anything that could qualify or know of anything going on elsewhere that could qualify? But it's best to isolate myself from any coworkers I might offend by accident and unknowingly in my autistic ignorance.) There are times I wish I was asexual and aromantic. Maybe I wouldn't crave human contact so much. I could be a good little desert Hermit/monk.
Actually don't, your wife is probably going to die in childbirth at the rate this shit is falling apart.
I need a replica of one of these for my Bronze-age Wizard so bad. Also, that guy needs a name, too. I wonder what the Proto-Indo-European or Proto-germanic name for the Hoopoe was. Or the Wryneck. Both of those seem like perfectly cromulent magical birds to me.
Roman stereotypes.
Yeah. I need to do this.
I wish I could save the day by making it weird.
I don't know how me and my date are going to ride Pippin around, though, he's pretty small. Though I don't know where I'd even meet a date....
It's this one.
I don't. That's my problem. I wish I was neurotypical. I bet I'd be happier.
This would make his job easier.
Meh.
I'm trying. I'm trying. Are you?
Moooooooooosssssss
I did have a fascinating (to me, anyway) shower thought this morning, though: there's plenty of archaeological, ethnographic, and ethnobotanic evidence for the use of Agave amongst the Hisat'sinom/Southern Sinagua people here in the Verde Valley, up into the historic period, but I'm not aware of any at all amongst the ancestral and modern Pueblo populations north of Flagstaff into the Hopi mesas, and east into the Chacoan heartland. Why? Is it as simple as Agave doesn't or even can't grow on the Colorado Plateau? Or is it a lack of research? I'm now wondering.
Yeah. Exactly. God, I miss having hope we'd have a Star Trek future. Now it's just mirror universe shit.
This. This is one of the few things that keeps the fire in my soul from burning out--this, and knowing he'd be Just As Angry as I am.
Yeah, pretty much. Tell me you're into me and tell me what you want me to do, please.
When are we going to realize that we have nothing to lose by burning down this whole place ourselves, and doing it just to spite those motherfuckers? If we can't burn them, let us burn the world around us so it's useless to them. Not my ideal solution, but it has crossed my mind.
More like full of finches/canaries, but yeah.
Shrikes endorse the impalement of fascists. Be a shrike, impale a fascist today, whether literally or metaphorically.
Hi Dennis.
I honestly don't know what hope feels like anymore. I pretty much go to bed at 9pm, wake up at 6am, sleep uneasily, awake from dreams screaming with Pippin sometimes whispering "itsokay itsokay love you too" at me. What little energy I have goes to collecting a few memes a day, posting them, hoping to feed some sort of flame of resistance.
My suggestion has been redacted for gratuitous amounts of blood pouring from the ruling class.
Pippin tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Peek-a-boo! Pretty bird." Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal, and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them, and tell them they're free to message me.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Chatty kitties part 16 ᓚᘏᗢ
item.description:
Welcome to part 16 of infinkitty. Check your Wi-Fi and your pockets … did you forget your keys again?!
Super quiet (and super cute) kitty snores, courtesy of @Mycatisbetterthanyourcat03
"Feed us!!"
Reminds me of The Neverending Story for some reason …
Tiny kitty with big opinions fights five-tentacled creature from the sky
Translation: "SHUT. THE. HECK. UP!!"
am fearce!!!! going to eat you!!!!
When you use up all the leftover “build a kitty“ parts
You're not you when you're hungry
English cocker lamp tax. ~ Part 1 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-2H36dD7 Part 2 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-2-At4BDLA Part 3 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-3-1kWpow7 Part 4 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-4-CelEHoq Part 5 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-5-ZaTUgym Part 6 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-6-iTGAyBs Part 7 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-7-OtLSfZK Part 8 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-8-B9QnwnD Part 9 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-9-5ctDpZm Part 10 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-10-tT7WhM8 Part 11 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-11-popEHkF Part 12 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-12-yDJWYyi Part 13 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-13-QLJTm7q Part 14 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-14-V6X1qZo Part 15 – https://imgur.com/gallery/chatty-kitties-part-15-abPq07r
